# Darts Daily
> Expert darts guides, product reviews and everything you need to know about darts.
## About
Darts Daily is a darts resource covering equipment reviews, setup guides, scoring rules and professional rankings. We help beginners and experienced players find the right gear and improve their game.
## Buying Guides
- [7 Best Dart Boards 2026](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/best-dart-boards): Comprehensive guide to the best bristle dartboards including the Winmau Blade 6, Blade 6 Dual Core, Blade 6 Triple Core, ONE80 Gladiator 3+, Viper Shot King, Unicorn Eclipse Pro 2 and Target ARC. Covers sisal construction, wiring systems, number ring rotation and setup tips.
- [7 Best Electronic Dart Boards 2026](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/best-electronic-dart-boards): Guide to the best electronic dartboards with automatic scoring and app connectivity. Features the Gran Board 3, Viper Solar Blast, Arachnid Cricket Pro 800 and more. Covers soft tip vs steel tip, Bluetooth connectivity and online multiplayer.
- [7 Best Darts for Beginners 2026](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/best-darts-for-beginners): Guide to the best tungsten darts for beginners covering the Target Hydro, Winmau Joe Cullen Special Edition, Red Dragon Javelin, Red Dragon Peter Wright Snakebite 3, Target Nathan Aspinall, Winmau MvG Aspire and Viper Blitz. Includes buying guide covering tungsten percentages, weight selection, grip patterns and essential accessories.
- [Best Darts Accessories 2026](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/best-darts-accessories): Complete guide to the best darts accessories in 2026 — flights, shafts, cases, mats, oches, sharpeners and more. 25 products reviewed and compared with recommendations for every budget.
## Player Profiles
- [PDC Player Profiles Hub](https://www.dartsdaily.net/players/): Central hub for in-depth PDC player profiles covering the darts each player uses, full signature gear setups, walk-on songs, net worth estimates, career highlights and stats. Features Luke Littler, Luke Humphries, Michael van Gerwen, Gian van Veen and Jonny Clayton.
- [Luke Littler Profile](https://www.dartsdaily.net/players/luke-littler): Profile of "The Nuke", the youngest-ever PDC World Champion and current World No. 1. Covers his 23g Target G1 SP darts, full gear setup, walk-on song "Greenlight" by Pitbull, dart board, net worth estimate, the famous televised nine-darter and career highlights.
- [Luke Humphries Profile](https://www.dartsdaily.net/players/luke-humphries): Profile of "Cool Hand", the 2024 PDC World Champion and former World No. 1. Covers his 22g Red Dragon TX1 darts, Joust XL shafts, dartboard surround, walk-on song "I Predict a Riot" by Kaiser Chiefs, net worth estimate and career highlights including his match-winning nine-darter.
- [Michael van Gerwen Profile](https://www.dartsdaily.net/players/michael-van-gerwen): Profile of "Mighty Mike" / "The Green Machine", the three-time PDC World Champion. Covers his 23g Winmau EvoX Pro darts, shafts, flights, wallet, dart board, walk-on song "Seven Nation Army" by The White Stripes, net worth estimate and the record 123.40 televised average.
- [Gian van Veen Profile](https://www.dartsdaily.net/players/gian-van-veen): Profile of "The Giant" (GVV), the 2025 European Champion and back-to-back PDC World Youth Champion. Covers his 21g Red Dragon Tour Edition darts (Original and Switch Points), walk-on song "Astronomia" by Tony Igy & Vicetone and career highlights.
- [Jonny Clayton Profile](https://www.dartsdaily.net/players/jonny-clayton): Profile of "The Ferret", the Welsh four-time major champion. Covers his 22g Red Dragon Hiraeth darts (Original and Switch Points), flights, dartboard surround, walk-on song "Johnny B. Goode" by Chuck Berry and his magical 2021 season including the World Grand Prix triumph.
- [Gary Anderson Profile](https://www.dartsdaily.net/players/gary-anderson): Profile of "The Flying Scotsman", the two-time back-to-back PDC World Champion (2015 and 2016). Covers his 23g Unicorn Phase 6 darts, signature flights, dart wallet, walk-on song "Jump Around" by House of Pain, career highlights and his iconic 2015 World Championship final win over Phil Taylor.
## Downloads
- [Downloads — Free PDC Draw Brackets](https://www.dartsdaily.net/downloads/): Free interactive draw brackets for every PDC European Tour and major tournament. Download the Excel file, enter match results as you watch and the bracket automatically updates through every round to the final. All players pre-filled from the official PDC draw. Works in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets. New bracket released for every event.
## Setup & Rules
- [Dart Board Distance & Height Guide](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/dart-board-distance-and-height): Official measurements for setting up a dartboard — bullseye height of 5ft 8in (1.73m), throwing distance of 7ft 9.25in (2.37m) for steel tip and 8ft (2.44m) for soft tip. Includes diagonal check method, wheelchair measurements and setup diagrams.
- [How to Score Darts — Complete Guide](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/how-to-score-darts): Complete guide to darts scoring covering board layout, segment values, 501 rules, checkout charts, Cricket scoring and common game variations. Explains doubles, trebles, bullseye scoring and finishing strategies.
- [Darts Rules — How to Play Darts](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/darts-rules): Complete beginner's guide to darts rules covering 501, 301, Cricket, Around the Clock, Killer, Shanghai and Halve-It. Includes dartboard layout explanation, scoring segments, common checkouts, bust rules, Cricket scoreboard format and darts etiquette.
- [How to Throw Darts — Technique Guide](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/how-to-throw-darts): Complete guide to throwing darts covering grip types (3-finger, 4-finger, pencil, front, rear), stance and foot position, aiming and sighting methods, throwing motion mechanics, release technique, follow-through, common mistakes, practice routines (20s practice, Around the Clock, Bob's 27, 100 darts at treble 20) and professional player techniques from Michael van Gerwen, Phil Taylor, Luke Humphries, Luke Littler, Peter Wright and Gary Anderson.
## Rankings
- [PDC Order of Merit 2026](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/pdc-order-of-merit): Current PDC rankings showing the top players, how the Order of Merit ranking system works, prize money distribution across tournaments and the two-year rolling ranking period.
## Tournaments
- [PDC World Darts Championship 2027](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/darts-world-championship): Complete guide to the 2026/27 Paddy Power World Darts Championship at Alexandra Palace, London. Covers the tournament schedule (10 December 2026 to 3 January 2027), £5,000,000 prize money breakdown with the winner taking £1,000,000, ticket information, 128-player format with set-based match structure, qualification routes including top 40 from PDC World Rankings, top 40 from Pro Tour Order of Merit and 48 international qualifiers. Features defending champion Luke Littler (beat Gian van Veen 7-1 in the 2026 final), full tournament history, Phil Taylor's record 14 PDC World Championship wins, complete list of all PDC World Champions from 1994 to 2026, international qualification breakdown covering Africa (first-ever guaranteed spots), Asia, Americas, Europe, development tours and women's qualifiers, and venue information about Alexandra Palace's Great Hall.
## Products
- [Darts Products](https://www.dartsdaily.net/products): Curated collection of 53 darts products including dartboards, darts sets, flights, shafts, cases, lighting, mats and accessories from brands like Winmau, Target, Red Dragon, Shot, Viper and Unicorn.
